Terraform will perform the following actions:

  # module.app.helm_release.app will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "helm_release" "app" {
        name      = "web-app"
        namespace = "default"
      ~ values    = [
          ~ "applications:\n  name: web\n  retry: true\n  rollout:\n    maxUnavailable: 1\n  env:\n    LOG_LEVEL: info\n" -> "applications:\n  name: web\n  retry: false\n  rollout:\n    maxUnavailable: 1\n  env:\n    LOG_LEVEL: debug\n",
        ]
      ~ set       = [
          ~ "image.tag=1.2.3" -> "image.tag=1.2.4",
            "resources.requests.cpu=250m",
        ]
      ~ metadata  = {
          ~ revision    = "7" -> "8"
          ~ app_version = "1.2.3" -> "1.2.4"
          + first_deployed = (known after apply)
        }
    }

  # aws_instance.web will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "aws_instance" "web" {
      ~ instance_type          = "t3.micro" -> "t3.small"
        ami                    = "ami-123456"
      ~ vpc_security_group_ids = [
            "sg-111",
          - "sg-222",
          + "sg-333",
        ]
      ~ tags                   = {
          ~ "Environment" = "staging" -> "prod"
            "Owner"       = "team-a"
          + "CostCenter"  = "platform"
        }
    }

  # aws_db_instance.primary must be replaced
  -/+ resource "aws_db_instance" "primary" {
        identifier              = "db-primary"
        engine                  = "postgres"
      ~ allocated_storage       = 50 -> 100 # forces replacement
      ~ backup_retention_period = 7 -> 14
      ~ tags                    = {
            "Environment" = "prod"
          + "Tier"        = "critical"
        }
      + endpoint                = (known after apply)
      + address                 = (known after apply)
    }

  # aws_security_group.legacy will be destroyed
  - resource "aws_security_group" "legacy" {
      - name        = "legacy-sg"
      - description = "deprecated"
      - ingress     = [
          - {
              - from_port   = 22
              - to_port     = 22
              - protocol    = "tcp"
              - cidr_blocks = [
                  - "0.0.0.0/0",
                ]
            },
        ]
      - tags        = {
          - "Environment" = "dev"
        }
    }

  # google_storage_bucket.assets will be created
  + resource "google_storage_bucket" "assets" {
      + name                        = "assets-prod"
      + location                    = "US"
      + uniform_bucket_level_access = true
      + versioning                  = {
          + enabled = true
        }
      + labels                      = {
          + "env"  = "prod"
          + "team" = "platform"
        }
      + self_link                   = (known after apply)
      + url                         = (known after apply)
    }

  # kubernetes_config_map.app_settings will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "kubernetes_config_map" "app_settings" {
      ~ data = {
          ~ "app.yaml"  = <<-EOT
                featureFlags:
              -   newCheckout: false
              +   newCheckout: true
                  betaUI: false
                rateLimits:
              -   perMinute: 120
              +   perMinute: 200
            EOT
          ~ "log_level" = "info" -> "debug"
        }
    }

  # aws_s3_bucket.root_0 will be created
  + resource "aws_s3_bucket" "root_0" {
      + bucket     = "root-bucket-0"
      + versioning = {
          + enabled = true
        }
      + tags       = {
          + "env" = "test"
          + "idx" = "0"
        }
      + arn        = (known after apply)
      + id         = (known after apply)
    }

  # aws_s3_bucket.root_1 will be created
  + resource "aws_s3_bucket" "root_1" {
      + bucket     = "root-bucket-1"
      + versioning = {
          + enabled = true
        }
      + tags       = {
          + "env" = "test"
          + "idx" = "1"
        }
      + arn        = (known after apply)
      + id         = (known after apply)
    }

      + bucket     = "root-bucket-2"
      + versioning = {
          + enabled = true
        }
      + tags       = {
          + "env" = "test"
          + "idx" = "2"
        }
      + arn        = (known after apply)
      + id         = (known after apply)
    }

  # aws_s3_bucket.root_3 will be created

      + bucket     = "root-bucket-3"
      + versioning = {
          + enabled = true
        }
      + tags       = {
          + "env" = "test"
          + "idx" = "3"
        }
      + arn        = (known after apply)
      + id         = (known after apply)
    }

      + versioning = {
          + enabled = true
        }
      + tags       = {

          + "idx" = "5"

      + arn        = (known after apply)
      + id         = (known after apply)
    }

  # module.alpha.aws_instance.node_0 will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "aws_instance" "node_0" {
      ~ instance_type = "t3.micro" -> "t3.small"
      ~ tags          = {
            "Role"   = "worker"
            "Module" = "module.alpha"
          + "Index"  = "0"
        }
    }

  # module.alpha.aws_instance.node_1 will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "aws_instance" "node_1" {
      ~ instance_type = "t3.micro" -> "t3.small"
      ~ tags          = {
            "Role"   = "worker"
            "Module" = "module.alpha"
          + "Index"  = "1"
        }
    }

      ~ tags          = {
            "Role"   = "worker"
            "Module" = "module.alpha"
          + "Index"  = "2"
        }
    }

  # module.beta.aws_lambda_function.handler_0 will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "aws_lambda_function" "handler_0" {
        function_name = "beta-handler-0"
      ~ runtime       = "python3.9" -> "python3.11"
      ~ memory_size   = 128 -> 256
      ~ environment   = {
          ~ variables = {
              ~ "LOG_LEVEL" = "INFO" -> "DEBUG"
              + "INDEX"     = "0"
            }
        }
    }

  # module.beta.aws_lambda_function.handler_1 will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "aws_lambda_function" "handler_1" {
        function_name = "beta-handler-1"
      ~ runtime       = "python3.9" -> "python3.11"
      ~ memory_size   = 128 -> 256
      ~ environment   = {
          ~ variables = {
              ~ "LOG_LEVEL" = "INFO" -> "DEBUG"
              + "INDEX"     = "1"
            }
        }
    }

  # module.beta.aws_lambda_function.handler_2 will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "aws_lambda_function" "handler_2" {

          ~ variables = {
              ~ "LOG_LEVEL" = "INFO" -> "DEBUG"
              + "INDEX"     = "2"

  # module.gamma.aws_sqs_queue.queue_0 will be created
  + resource "aws_sqs_queue" "queue_0" {

      + visibility_timeout_seconds = 30
      + message_retention_seconds  = 345600
      + tags                       = {
          + "Module" = "gamma"
          + "Index"  = "0"
        }
      + arn                        = (known after apply)
      + url                        = (known after apply)
    }

  # module.delta.aws_dynamodb_table.table_0 will be created
  + resource "aws_dynamodb_table" "table_0" {
      + name           = "delta-table-0"
      + billing_mode   = "PAY_PER_REQUEST"
      + hash_key       = "pk"
      + range_key      = "sk"
      + attribute      = [
          + {
              + name = "pk"
              + type = "S"
            },
          + {
              + name = "sk"
              + type = "S"
            },
        ]
      + tags           = {
          + "Module" = "delta"
          + "Index"  = "0"
        }
      + arn            = (known after apply)
      + stream_arn     = (known after apply)
    }

  # module.delta.aws_dynamodb_table.table_1 will be created
  + resource "aws_dynamodb_table" "table_1" {
      + name           = "delta-table-1"
      + billing_mode   = "PAY_PER_REQUEST"
      + hash_key       = "pk"
      + range_key      = "sk"
      + attribute      = [
          + {
              + name = "pk"
              + type = "S"
            },
          + {
              + name = "sk"
              + type = "S"
            },
        ]
      + tags           = {
          + "Module" = "delta"
          + "Index"  = "1"
        }
      + arn            = (known after apply)
      + stream_arn     = (known after apply)

  # module.zeta.azurerm_storage_account.storage_0 will be created
  + resource "azurerm_storage_account" "storage_0" {
      + name                     = "zetastorage0"
      + resource_group_name      = "zeta-rg"
      + location                 = "eastus"
      + account_tier             = "Standard"
      + account_replication_type = "LRS"
      + tags                     = {
          + "module" = "zeta"
          + "index"  = "0"
        }
      + primary_blob_endpoint    = (known after apply)
      + primary_access_key       = (known after apply)
    }

  # module.zeta.azurerm_storage_account.storage_1 will be created
  + resource "azurerm_storage_account" "storage_1" {
      + name                     = "zetastorage1"
      + resource_group_name      = "zeta-rg"
      + location                 = "eastus"
      + account_tier             = "Standard"
      + account_replication_type = "LRS"
      + tags                     = {
          + "module" = "zeta"
          + "index"  = "1"
        }
      + primary_blob_endpoint    = (known after apply)
      + primary_access_key       = (known after apply)
    }

  # module.eta.aws_ecs_service.service will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "aws_ecs_service" "service" {
        name            = "eta-service"
        cluster         = "eta-cluster"
      ~ desired_count   = 2 -> 4
      ~ task_definition = "eta-task:5" -> "eta-task:6"
      ~ deployment_configuration = {
          ~ maximum_percent         = 200 -> 250
          ~ minimum_healthy_percent = 50 -> 100
        }
    }

  # module.theta.aws_cloudwatch_log_group.logs_0 will be created
  + resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_group" "logs_0" {
      + name              = "/theta/logs-0"
      + retention_in_days = 30
      + tags              = {
          + "module" = "theta"
          + "index"  = "0"
        }
      + arn               = (known after apply)
    }

  # module.theta.aws_cloudwatch_log_group.logs_1 will be created

      + name              = "/theta/logs-1"
      + retention_in_days = 30
      + tags              = {
          + "module" = "theta"
          + "index"  = "1"
        }
      + arn               = (known after apply)
    }

      + tags              = {
          + "module" = "theta"
          + "index"  = "2"

      + arn               = (known after apply)
    }

      + name         = "iota-topic-2"
      + display_name = "Iota Topic 2"
      + tags         = {
          + "module" = "iota"
          + "index"  = "2"
        }
      + arn          = (known after apply)
    }

  # module.kappa.kubernetes_deployment.app will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "kubernetes_deployment" "app" {
        metadata = {
            name      = "kappa-app"
            namespace = "kappa"
        }
      ~ spec = {
          ~ replicas = 3 -> 5
          ~ template = {
              ~ spec = {
                  ~ container = [
                      ~ {
                            name  = "app"
                          ~ image = "app:v1.0.0" -> "app:v1.1.0"
                          ~ resources = {
                              ~ requests = {
                                  ~ cpu    = "100m" -> "200m"
                                  ~ memory = "128Mi" -> "256Mi"
                                }
                              ~ limits = {
                                  ~ cpu    = "500m" -> "1000m"
                                  ~ memory = "512Mi" -> "1Gi"
                                }
                            }
                        },
                    ]
                }
            }
        }
    }

  # module.lambda_nested.module.inner.aws_lambda_function.func will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "aws_lambda_function" "func" {
        function_name = "nested-lambda"
      ~ timeout       = 30 -> 60
      ~ memory_size   = 128 -> 512
      ~ environment   = {
          ~ variables = {
              ~ "STAGE" = "dev" -> "prod"
            }
        }
    }

Plan: 27 to add, 21 to change, 1 to destroy.
